category_sources: source_facts.description says hashcash is a proof-of-work algorithm to counter denial-of-service attacks.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides hashcash; official homepage uses Hashcash.
docs_sources: Official hashcash.org hosts the hashcash documentation page under /docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage and docs were identified, but no official source-control project URL was found. Source archive in source_facts points to Debian source rather than an official SCM repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official hashcash documentation describe proof-of-work for DoS and anti-spam style uses.
